content.text:
Looking at the image, the track curves gently to the right ahead with the car positioned slightly left of center, and the curve appears to be continuing through the bend.

**Waypoint Analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 51, target = 51 + 5 = 56
- Waypoint 56: (4.2557, 3.1701)
- Car position: (5.1078, 2.6889)
- Bearing = atan2(3.1701 - 2.6889, 4.2557 - 5.1078) = atan2(0.4812, -0.8521)
- = 180 - atan2(0.4812, 0.8521) = 180 - 29.43° = 150.57°
- Current heading: 166.91°
- Delta = 150.57 - 166.91 = -16.34° → right correction needed

```json
{
  "reasoning": "Track continues curving right ahead, delta to waypoint 56 is -16.34° confirming right turn needed, applying -15 steering at speed 1.5 since delta is in the 15-30° range and closer to 15°.",
  "knowledge": [
    "Track has a long straight section heading ~180° (due west) along y≈2.77",
    "Right-curving section spans waypoints 48-58, delta consistently -16 to -22°",
    "Car is consistently ~0.07-0.17m left of center — slight left bias throughout",
    "Full circuit ~17.7m, speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for moderate curves",
    "Use steering_angle=0 for delta <5° to avoid oscillation on near-straight sections",
    "Track width ~0.76m — 0.07m left of center is nearly centered, good position",
    "Heading is ~167° (west-southwest), track curves right (south) ahead",
    "Delta around -16° in this section — use -15 steering at 1.5 speed",
    "Previous -20 steering at delta -20° was slightly aggressive; -15 at -16° is better",
    "Waypoints 51-58 show gradual right curve continuing, moderate correction needed"
  ],
  "movement_analysis": {
    "x": [5.3762, 5.2864, 5.2215, 5.1614, 5.1078],
    "y": [2.6021, 2.6127, 2.6307, 2.6592, 2.6889],
    "yaw": [-177.092, 179.597, 175.900, 170.748, 166.911]
  },
  "waypoint_analysis": -16.34,
  "speed": 1.5,
  "steering_angle": -15.0
}
```
